candidates.why: Appears directly beneath 'Cost of goods sold' with 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value'; this indicates it is a component of the selected COGS total rather than a separate same-level operating expense to add later.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of goods sold'. The explicit COGS D&A row appears nested within that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.why: The populated row sits under 'Sales and marketing' and exactly bridges to 'Sales and marketing - Balancing value', so it appears to be a component of the already selected 'Sales and marketing' total, not a separate add-on.

Appears as a component of the selected 'Research and development' total because it sums with 'Other Research/Develop.' to the R&D line. Also R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would distort the intended construction.
Label is relevant to SG&A D&A, but the row is blank in the excerpt and therefore provides no separate amount to add.
Potential D&A-related label, but the row is blank and not clearly tied as a separate SG&A line to add later.
Generic D&A label, but the row is blank and not usable as a separate operating D&A add-back row.

variables.notes: The visible SG&A/R&D D&A rows are components embedded within already selected parent rows ('Sales and marketing' and 'Research and development'). No separate same-level SG&A D&A total should be added.
